summary: Iteration 31: P0+P1 Polish fixes for Trauma pilot product page template fully verified. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed all P0+P1 features working correctly.
test_credentials: No credentials needed - catalog endpoints are public
seed_data_creation: None - using existing catalog_products and catalog_skus collections
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0+P1 Polish pass complete. All features verified: image_type field, parent_brand field, title-cased spec keys, unified coating terminology, category placeholders, brochure thumbnails, dedicated brochure download section, clickable brochure source in SKU table. Test slugs verified: 2.4mm-lps-volar-rim-distal-radial-plate (4 SKUs), clavo-intramedullary-nail (59 SKUs), anti-rotation-screw (5 SKUs), armar-titanium-plates (16 SKUs), 2.7mm-3.5mm-lps-medial-distal-humerus-plates (83 SKUs).

P0_fixes.image_type_field: PASS - API returns image_type (brochure_cover/product_photo) for all products
P0_fixes.title_cased_spec_keys: PASS - Spec keys are title-cased (Thickness, Coating, Design)
P0_fixes.unified_coating_term: PASS - Coating shows 'Bionik Gold Surface (TiNbN Coating)'
P0_fixes.category_placeholders: PASS - Catalog listing shows Bone icons instead of brochure images
P0_fixes.family_code_label: PASS - Product detail shows 'Family Code' instead of 'Primary SKU'

P1_fixes.brand_parent_display: PASS - Shows 'AURIC by Meril' format in product cards and detail page
P1_fixes.brochure_thumbnail: PASS - Brochure thumbnail shown as secondary element below placeholder
P1_fixes.brochure_download_section: PASS - Dedicated 'Product Documentation' section with download button
P1_fixes.clickable_brochure_source: PASS - SKU table source column shows clickable brochure filename

many_variant_products.clavo_59_skus: PASS - SKU table renders all 59 variants correctly
many_variant_products.humerus_83_skus: PASS - API returns 83 SKUs with correct specs
many_variant_products.armar_16_skus: PASS - 16 SKUs with brand 'Armar' and parent_brand 'Meril'
many_variant_products.anti_rotation_5_skus: PASS - 5 SKUs with correct image_type and parent_brand

related_products.category_placeholders: PASS - Related products show Bone icons instead of brochure images

api_endpoints.GET /api/catalog/products: PASS - Returns image_type and parent_brand for all products
api_endpoints.GET /api/catalog/products/{slug}: PASS - Returns normalized specs, image_type, parent_brand
